title: Declutter When You're Overwhelmed
blurb: You don't have a mess problem. You have a decision problem — and nobody ever told you that. This book gives you a system built to need less willpower: pre-made keep/toss rules, a four-zone sort that touches each object once, an attack order that saves the hardest categories for last, a separate slower process for sentimental items, and 90-second sessions for the days you have nothing left.
